title: 02 eat center wear peel
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Image 1 controls Raul and Meg identity and product, relocated to football bleachers. Image 2 supplies Raul's face and orange energy. Image 3 supplies only the broad idea of mango armor around a visible human center; reject its blocky pixel form, empty background, and generic robot proportions. Raul has just eaten the center of a peeled mango gummy. The long empty golden peel spirals around his torso while exactly six tiny mango gummy hype-men pull, flatten, and fasten it into glossy translucent shoulder and arm plates. Raul's real face and body remain visible. Meg watches beside him. Clear physical assembly, sparks and speed lines, no tools or guns.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage or storyboard grid. Follow each prompt's reference roles. Preserve Raul as the same dark-haired teenage boy and Meg as the same blonde teenage girl from the source images, but always relocate their encounter from the park bench to crowded high-school football bleachers. Preserve their youthful live-action identity while allowing anime effects and tactile candy characters. Raul's mango helpers are small energetic translucent orange-gold gummy hype-men who physically assist his transformation. Meg has exactly one acid-green apple gummy imp: small, clever, sardonic, inviting, and confectionary rather than monstrous. Raul's event is public orange spectacle; Meg's is private green invitation. Avoid preschool mascot styling, weapons, generic robots, anatomy, gore, unwanted extra characters, captions, borders, watermarks, and added package copy.
